instructions.summary: Create a Quora account so the agent can draft answers to 8+ Portugal freelancer tax questions with VerdeDesk backlinks.
instructions.detail: Quora has 8+ high-value unanswered or poorly-answered questions about Portugal freelancer taxes, D8 visa taxes, recibos verdes, and VAT exemptions. Each answer can include a helpful link to a relevant VerdeDesk guide. Quora answers get indexed by Google and drive direct referral traffic. This is the highest-value distribution channel available that doesn't require GSC.
instructions.exact_action: Go to quora.com, sign up with carlos.gaspar2011@gmail.com (or existing account), then share the login credentials by adding them to ~/.founder-secrets as QUORA_EMAIL and QUORA_PASSWORD. Alternatively, answer these questions yourself using the draft answers the agent will prepare in the next session.
instructions.unblocks: Agent can post substantive answers to 8+ high-intent questions, each linking to a relevant VerdeDesk guide. Expected: indexed backlinks + direct referral traffic from Quora.
